question: When in eBook mode of this eReader, what will happen after pressing "M" botton?
content: In eBook mode, pressing the M button opens the eBook option menu with Page Jump, Save Mark, Load Mark, Del Mark, Browser Mode, Flip Time, Brightness, and Set color.<PIC>
ret: "In eBook mode, pressing the M button opens the eBook option menu with Page Jump, Save Mark, Load Mark, Del Mark, Browser Mode, Flip Time, Brightness, and Set color.<PIC>",["eReader_08"]
notes: The raw question recovers the intended quoted M button. The eBook section states that pressing M opens the listed eBook options; eReader_08 shows the same menu.
